question: 帮我查询订单号为126022652882480的数据，包含货号、数量、商品名称和金额
expected_sql: SELECT goods_sn, goods_number, goods_name, share_payment FROM order_goods WHERE order_sn = '126022652882480'

question: 查询一下2026年2月份所有商品的销售额和销量，表头为商品货号，商品名，销售额，销量
expected_sql: select og.goods_sn 商品货号,og.goods_name 商品名,sum(og.share_payment) 销售额,sum(og.goods_number) 销量 from order_info oi join order_goods og on oi.order_sn=og.order_sn where oi.pay_time>='2026-02-01 00:00:00' group by og.goods_sn,og.goods_name

question: 查询订单号为126022652882480的订单详情，包含订单号、交易号、付款时间、完成时间、店铺名称、发货仓库名称
expected_sql: SELECT oi.order_sn, oi.deal_code, oi.pay_time, oi.shipping_time_ck, kh.khmc AS shop_name, ck.ckmc AS shipping_warehouse_name FROM order_info oi JOIN kehu kh ON oi.sd_id = kh.Id JOIN cangku ck ON oi.fhck_id = ck.Id WHERE oi.order_sn = '126022652882480'

question: 查询2026年3月所有店铺的总销量和总销售额,表头为店铺名称，总销量，总销售额
expected_sql: SELECT k.khmc AS 店铺名称, SUM(og.goods_number) AS 总销量, SUM(og.share_payment) AS 总销售额 FROM order_info oi JOIN kehu k ON oi.sd_id = k.Id JOIN order_goods og ON oi.order_id = og.order_id WHERE oi.pay_time >= '2026-03-01 00:00:00' AND oi.pay_time < '2026-04-01 00:00:00' GROUP BY k.khmc ORDER BY 总销售额 DESC

question: 帮我拉一下这个月店铺名为爱库存店的销售数据，表头为订单号，货号，商品名称，数量，金额
expected_sql: SELECT oi.order_sn AS '订单号', og.goods_sn AS '货号', og.goods_name AS '商品名称', og.goods_number AS '数量', og.share_payment AS '金额' FROM order_info oi INNER JOIN kehu k ON oi.sd_id = k.Id INNER JOIN order_goods og ON oi.order_id = og.order_id WHERE k.khmc = '爱库存店' AND DATE_FORMAT(oi.pay_time, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m')

question: 拉取2026年的销售数据，表头为店铺，货号，销售数量，销售金额
expected_sql: SELECT k.khmc AS `店铺`, og.goods_sn AS `货号`, SUM(og.goods_number) AS `销售数量`, SUM(og.share_payment) AS `销售金额` FROM order_info oi JOIN order_goods og ON oi.order_sn = og.order_sn AND oi.deal_code = og.deal_code JOIN kehu k ON oi.sd_id = k.Id WHERE YEAR(oi.pay_time) = 2026 GROUP BY k.khmc, og.goods_sn ORDER BY k.khmc, og.goods_sn

question: 拉一下爱库存店这个月各仓库的发货数量，表头为仓库名，数量
expected_sql: SELECT ck.ckmc AS `仓库名`, SUM(og.goods_number) AS `数量` FROM order_info oi JOIN order_goods og ON oi.order_id = og.order_id JOIN cangku ck ON oi.fhck_id = ck.Id JOIN kehu kh ON oi.sd_id = kh.Id WHERE kh.khmc = '爱库存店' AND DATE_FORMAT(oi.shipping_time_ck, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m') GROUP BY ck.Id, ck.ckmc ORDER BY `数量` DESC

question: 查一下这个月货号为116040005330420的销售数据，表头为订单号，货号，商品名，店铺，数量，金额
expected_sql: SELECT oi.order_sn AS '订单号', og.goods_sn AS '货号', og.goods_name AS '商品名', kh.khmc AS '店铺', og.goods_number AS '数量', og.share_payment AS '金额' FROM order_goods og INNER JOIN order_info oi ON og.order_id = oi.order_id INNER JOIN kehu kh ON oi.sd_id = kh.Id WHERE og.goods_sn = '116040005330420' AND oi.pay_time >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') AND oi.pay_time < DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)

question: 查一下这个月一单多货的订单有哪些，表头为订单号，店铺，货号，数量，金额
expected_sql: SELECT oi.order_sn AS '订单号', k.khmc AS '店铺', og.goods_sn AS '货号', og.goods_number AS '数量', og.share_payment AS '金额' FROM order_info oi JOIN order_goods og ON oi.order_id = og.order_id JOIN kehu k ON oi.sd_id = k.Id WHERE DATE_FORMAT(oi.pay_time, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m') AND oi.order_id IN ( SELECT order_id FROM order_goods GROUP BY order_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ) ORDER BY oi.order_sn, og.goods_sn
